creator: root@minime.privatelabs.com
text:
To install the gimp-manual one is forced to install X11.

Fix: 

Perhaps, remove the USE_X_PREFIX=yes from the Makefiles, or
	change the semantics of USE_X_PREFIX to change the prefix, but
	to not require the full X11 install. Or something else...
How-To-Repeat: 
	On an X-less machine try to install the gimp-manual-anything port
